description: A polished travel discovery app (Voyago) with mock state, MVUX, and an adaptive shell (sidebar NavigationView on desktop, bottom TabBar on mobile). Home features a greeting, search entry, a hero destination carousel, quick actions, recommended trips, and explore categories. Includes dedicated Search, Trips, Favorites, and Profile pages with a clean, image-rich Material UI.

messages.content:
Generate a polished travel discovery app with:
- mock state
- an adaptive shell: sidebar navigation on desktop, bottom tab bar on mobile
- a clean, image-rich Material UI

Home screen:
- greeting header with user avatar and notifications
- a search entry (destinations, flights, hotels)
- a hero destination carousel
- quick action shortcuts
- a "Recommended for You" horizontal list of trips
- explore categories grid

Navigation:
- Home, Search, Trips, Favorites and Profile pages
- adaptive: NavigationView sidebar on wide screens, bottom TabBar on narrow screens

Include:
- full working code
- navigation between pages
- mock state
- seeded sample data (destinations, trips, categories)
Here's your **Voyago** travel app! It's built and running in the preview.

suggestedPrompts: Add a destination details page with navigation

messages.content:
Generate a polished travel discovery app with:
- mock state
- an adaptive shell: sidebar navigation on desktop, bottom tab bar on mobile
- a clean, image-rich Material UI

Home screen:
- greeting header with user avatar and notifications
- a search entry (destinations, flights, hotels)
- a hero destination carousel
- quick action shortcuts
- a "Recommended for You" horizontal list of trips
- explore categories grid

Navigation:
- Home, Search, Trips, Favorites and Profile pages
- adaptive: NavigationView sidebar on wide screens, bottom TabBar on narrow screens

Include:
- full working code
- navigation between pages
- mock state
- seeded sample data (destinations, trips, categories)

I've created a complete Uno Platform app at Voyago/Voyago.csproj.

**Key files:**
- Voyago/App.xaml
- Voyago/App.xaml.cs
- Voyago/GlobalUsings.cs
- Voyago/Voyago.csproj
- Voyago/ThemeColors.xaml
- Voyago/Models/AppConfig.cs
- Voyago/Presentation/MainPage.xaml
- Voyago/Presentation/MainPage.xaml.cs
- Voyago/Presentation/MainModel.cs
- Voyago/Presentation/HomePage.xaml
- Voyago/Presentation/HomePage.xaml.cs
- Voyago/Presentation/HomeModel.cs
- Voyago/Presentation/SearchPage.xaml
- Voyago/Presentation/SearchPage.xaml.cs
- Voyago/Presentation/SearchModel.cs
- Voyago/Presentation/TripsPage.xaml
- Voyago/Presentation/TripsPage.xaml.cs
- Voyago/Presentation/TripsModel.cs
- Voyago/Presentation/FavoritesPage.xaml
- Voyago/Presentation/FavoritesPage.xaml.cs
- Voyago/Presentation/FavoritesModel.cs
- Voyago/Presentation/ProfilePage.xaml
- Voyago/Presentation/ProfilePage.xaml.cs
- Voyago/Presentation/ProfileModel.cs
- Voyago/Presentation/SharedTypes.cs
- Voyago/Platforms/Desktop/Program.cs
- Voyago/Platforms/WebAssembly/Program.cs

**Structure:**
- The app uses MVUX (each page has a matching *Model record) and Uno.Extensions.Navigation with attached Regions for page routing.
- MainPage is the adaptive shell. A VisualStateManager with AdaptiveTriggers switches between a NarrowState (bottom utu:TabBar) and Normal/Wide states (NavigationView sidebar, MinWindowWidth 700/1000). Both the NavigationView menu items and the TabBar items are wired with uen:Region.Name to Home, Search, Trips, Favorites, Profile.
- HomePage shows a greeting header, a search entry card, a hero FlipView carousel, quick actions (ItemsRepeater + UniformGridLayout), a horizontal "Recommended for You" list, and an explore categories grid. It binds to HomeModel.
- Shared domain records (Destination, TripItem, ExploreCategory) live in SharedTypes.cs and are reused across pages.
- Styling uses Material theme resources (ThemeResource brushes, typography styles) and Uno.Toolkit CardContentControl. ThemeColors.xaml defines the palette. All data is mock/seeded in the *Model records.

The app is built and running. The user may ask me to modify it.
